title: Scopper Gaban Tests Luffy
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Shamrock, Unknown person #12 as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, you're gonna let loose a full speed kick to the right side of my face...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These arrows show the trajectory of my future...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...only I can stop it before it happens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Will you become a God's knight?

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
